verses.1: For the music director. A Psalm of David the servant of the LORD. Wrongdoing speaks to the ungodly within his heart; There is no fear of God before his eyes.
verses.2: For it flatters him in his own eyes Concerning the discovery of his wrongful deed and the hatred of it.
verses.3: The words of his mouth are wickedness and deceit; He has ceased to be wise and to do good.
verses.4: He plans wickedness on his bed; He sets himself on a path that is not good; He does not reject evil.
verses.5: Your mercy, LORD, extends to the heavens, Your faithfulness reaches to the skies.
verses.6: Your righteousness is like the mountains of God; Your judgments are like the great deep. LORD, You protect mankind and animals.
verses.7: How precious is Your mercy, God! And the sons of mankind take refuge in the shadow of Your wings.
verses.8: They drink their fill of the abundance of Your house; And You allow them to drink from the river of Your delights.
verses.9: For the fountain of life is with You; In Your light we see light.
verses.10: Prolong Your mercy to those who know You, And Your righteousness to the upright of heart.
verses.11: May the foot of pride not come upon me, And may the hand of the wicked not drive me away.
verses.12: Those who do injustice have fallen there; They have been thrust down and cannot rise.
